ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist who performed the song */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the song style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the song style */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the song style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_style_bridge" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song style */,
  "primary_style" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style is the primary style of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "ranking_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was ranked */,
  "ranking_position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the ranking */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the ranking is applicable */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "automated_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each automated analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the automated analysis method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the automated analysis method */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Performance metric of the automated analysis method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the automated analysis method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the automated analysis method */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result of the automated analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES automated_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was last updated */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date when the song was added to the playlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)
